name: jetson-edgellm-v080-customvoice
description: v0.8.0 edgellm STREAMING ASR (Qwen3-ASR) + Qwen3-TTS-12Hz-0.6B CustomVoice (int4 talker + fp8 text_embedding) via the jetson.trt_edge_llm backend driving the v0.8.0 streaming worker (qwen3_tts_streaming_worker). CustomVoice uses NAMED speakers (e.g. serena=3066) via the qwen3-tts-customvoice speaker table — NOT an external base speaker embedding. ONE worker binary serves both Base (8-row) and CustomVoice (9-row) via a runtime-if on langId (overlay UPSTREAM_PIN=c48c0de). DERIVED from jetson-edgellm-v080-qwen3ttsbase: ASR half copied verbatim; TTS half swapped to CustomVoice. LOAD-BEARING: EDGELLM_PLUGIN_PATH MUST point at the CV-matched plugin (libNvInfer_edgellm_plugin_cv.so, built from the same c48c0de source as the worker) — the streaming worker core-dumps at TRT deserialize against any other plugin. EDGE_LLM_TTS_STATEFUL_CODE2WAV=1 is REQUIRED: the streaming worker drives _synthesize_worker_via_stream (gated on stateful_code2wav_enabled()); with =0 the non-streaming branch raises KeyError 'output_file'. Through-service gate PASS on orin-nano (HTTP 200, faster-whisper exact roundtrip zh/en, Base no-regression). See docs/deploy-customvoice-v080.md for the operator-override caveats (the baked entrypoint pre-stamps EDGE_LLM_TTS_*/OVS_TTS_* which are operator-prefixed and win over this profile — they must be passed as -e or the entrypoint must not pre-stamp). Production /opt paths below assume the CV bundle is baked at /opt/models/qwen3-tts-customvoice/.
